notes: estimate-view Print/Save-PDF CTA. The button renders ONLY after getEstimateForView succeeds, which requires a server-minted portal_tokens token + a matching estimateId (est.leadId===tok.leadId) delivered to the homeowner via an OUTBOUND SMS/email — a sending boundary, and Twilio is blocked. The client exposes NO estimate-view link builder (grep: zero client construction of estimate-view URLs), and portal_tokens are server-read-only (client read = permission-denied), so the live-rendered CTA can't be reached without sending. SOURCE-VERIFIED instead: the delegate (estimate-view.html:382-388) calls window.print() on data-ev-action=print — identical to dozens of verified data-*-action delegates. PR #630 a-vs-button STYLING FIX CONFIRMED LANDED on origin/main (commit c95493c1: .ev-cta-row a,button combined selectors + border/cursor/font-family resets) and deployed — the homeowner CTAs ARE orange-brand styled. (NEW-D41 was investigated + RETRACTED: the apparent 'still-broken' CSS was the stale feat/pro-terms-page working copy in the main clone, which predates #630; origin/main is correct.) No-token + invalid-token 400 error states were live-verified in the prior pages-a pass.

estimate-view Back CTA. Same outbound-token live-render gate as pages-a-001. SOURCE-VERIFIED: delegate (estimate-view.html:387) calls history.back() on data-ev-action=back. Styling = same #630 fix (confirmed landed on origin/main + deployed). Live click unreachable without a server-minted token via outbound homeowner SMS/email (boundary + Twilio-blocked).
